description: Rutter provides a unified API layer for connecting to third-party business systems such as accounting, commerce, payments, ads, and banking platforms. Its product includes an end-user linking flow called Rutter Link and APIs for reading and writing business data across those systems.
summary: Rutter exposes a versioned REST API authenticated with Rutter-issued client credentials, plus two frontend integration packages for Rutter Link (`@rutter/rutter-link` and `react-rutter-link`) that use a Rutter-issued public key; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or standalone CLI was found.
